item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.2","is_repeated_local_repair":true,"same_means_type":true,"prior_repair_count":3,"is_n_plus_1_request":true,"is_bounded_emergency_exception_request":false,"emergency_constraint_present":true,"repeated_bypass_unresolved":true,"post_exception_closure_required":false,"pressure_present":true,"confidence":0.96,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"倒伏风险在受理单里被单列；后来树根外露，又单列；上周树干空洞，也单列"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"现在枝条断裂的来电变多，请在市政养护受理里再加一个受理项"},{"role":"assistant","turn_index":1,"span":"不应再按“哪类来电变多就新增哪一项”的方式处理"},{"role":"user","turn_index":2,"span":"今天傍晚前必须处理投诉，不要重做受理模型"},{"role":"user","turn_index":2,"span":"你先把这一个受理项怎么写、放在哪里告诉我"}],"abstain_reason":""}
